title: grammitis pilosissima
intro: Grammitis pilosissima, also known as the hairy cliff fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Grammitidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Grammitis pilosissima include treating various skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as providing relief from arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Herbal preparations of Grammitis pilosissima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
